short_blurb: Careful, quality roofing for South Pasadena's historic homes and character neighborhoods.
local_note: South Pasadena has a nationally recognized historic district and a high concentration of Victorian, Craftsman, and Spanish Colonial Revival homes. We specialize in working carefully on these properties — matching original profiles, preserving existing wood trim and details, and installing systems that meet historic district guidelines where applicable. We approach every South Pasadena job as the detailed, character-home project it deserves to be.

faqs.q: Can you replace my South Pasadena Craftsman's roof without altering its historic appearance?
faqs.a: Yes. We work with Class A composition shingles and concrete tiles available in profiles that closely match original cedar shake and clay tile looks. We'll bring samples to your home before committing to any material selection.
